results.rendered_html:
aśubha a.
1 Inauspicious.
2 Impure, dirty, foul (opp. śubha); śubhenāśubhena vopāyena  K. 158  by any means, fair or foul.
3 Unlucky, unfortunate.
— bhaṃ
1 Inauspiciousness.
2 Sin, a shameful deed.
3 Misfortune, calamity; nāthe kutastvayyaśubhaṃ prajānāṃ  R. 5. 13 ; prāyaḥ śubhaṃ vidadhātyaśubhaṃ ca jaṃtoḥ  Māl. 1. 23. 
Comp.
— udayaḥ an inauspicious omen.
